<current_datetime>2026-04-07T13:08:37.561Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

data.content:
Use the `--filter-class` option:

```
dotnet run --project TestProject.csproj -- --filter-class *.SmsNotificationTests
```

This filters by class name and will run only the two tests in `SmsNotificationTests` (`SendSms_HealthCheck` and `SendSms_ValidPhone_Succeeds`). TUnit uses `dotnet run` instead of `dotnet test`, and `--filter-class` accepts a glob pattern.
